app.name: Family Genealogy Management
app.description: Preserve your family trees, members, relationships, events, and media.

common.offline: You are offline · Cached data is still available
common.pendingChanges: {count, plural, =1 {1 change waiting to sync} other {# changes waiting to sync}}

navigation.chooseTree: Choose a family tree to open this section

dashboard.welcome: Preserve your family story, one generation at a time.
dashboard.overviewHint: A summary of the stories kept in your workspace.
dashboard.upcoming: No events in the next 7 days
dashboard.upcomingHint: Birthdays, anniversaries, and family milestones will appear here.
dashboard.upcomingEmpty: No events in the next 7 days.
dashboard.getStartedHint: Create a private space for your family and invite relatives to contribute.
dashboard.noActivity: Your family activity will appear here.
dashboard.privacyHint: Family data is protected and shared only with people you invite.

trees.metaTitle: My family trees | Family Genealogy Management
trees.title: My family trees
trees.subtitle: Choose a space to continue your family story.
trees.emptyDescription: Create your first tree to preserve generations, relationships, and memories.
trees.createDescription: Create a private space for your family's story.
trees.name: Tree name

errors.generic: The family tree could not be loaded or created.

treeViewer.title: Family tree
treeViewer.description: Explore your family's generations, relationships, and stories in one visual space.
treeViewer.lineageHint: Highlight the path from a root ancestor
treeViewer.selectForLineage: Select a member to view their lineage
treeViewer.densityHint: Change the member card detail level
treeViewer.loadError: Unable to load the family tree data.
treeViewer.errorTitle: Unable to open this family tree
treeViewer.emptyTitle: Your family tree is ready for its first story
treeViewer.emptyDescription: Add the first member to begin connecting your family's generations.
treeViewer.interactionHint: Tap or click for a summary · double-click to open a profile · drag the background to pan · pinch to zoom.

membersPage.title: Members
membersPage.description: Manage the people, stories, and connections that make up your family tree.
membersPage.updatedHint: Changes appear across the family tree instantly

empty.title: No members yet
empty.description: Add the first person to start connecting generations.
empty.searchDescription: Try another keyword or clear a filter.

form.avatarHint: Add a public image link if available.
form.requiredName: Please enter a first and last name.
form.invalidDates: The death date cannot be before the birth date.

membersPage.editDescription: Every change is recorded in the family tree activity history.

errors.generic: The action could not be completed. Please try again.
errors.notFound: This member could not be found.

delete.title: Delete member
delete.description: You are about to delete {name}. This cannot be undone.
delete.impact: Related data will be affected as follows:
delete.media: {count} media files linked only to this member will be deleted

detail.storyHint: The details your family wants to preserve.
detail.noStory: No biography has been added yet.

eventsPage.title: Events & milestones
eventsPage.description: Save meaningful dates and connect them to relatives, media, and family stories.

empty.title: No events yet
empty.description: Create the first milestone to begin your family timeline.

form.title: Event name
form.descriptionHint: Add participants and media to make the story complete.
form.requiredCustom: Please enter a custom event type.

errors.generic: Event data could not be loaded.

mediaPage.title: Media library
mediaPage.description: Keep photos and documents safe, organized in albums, and connected to family stories.

empty.title: Your archive is ready for its first memory
empty.description: Upload JPEG, PNG, WebP images or PDF documents up to 10MB to begin.

upload.title: Upload media
upload.description: Choose multiple files and link them to members, events, or an album.
upload.drop: Drop files here or click to browse
upload.allowed: JPEG, PNG, WebP or PDF · up to 10MB per file

album.title: Create photo album
album.description: Group memories by theme so they are easy to find again.
album.name: Album name

errors.generic: Media library data could not be loaded.

memberSearch.title: Find a family member
memberSearch.description: Search by name, nickname, occupation, or birthplace — accents are optional.
memberSearch.startDescription: Type 2 or more characters for instant suggestions, or open filters to narrow the results.
memberSearch.emptyDescription: Try another keyword, widen the birth-year range, or remove some filters.
memberSearch.selectHint: Select to locate on the tree

filters.title: Filters
filters.invalidYears: The starting year cannot be later than the ending year.

reportsPage.title: Reports & statistics
reportsPage.description: Explore the size, characteristics, and growth of your family tree through clear visual insights.

charts.empty: There is not enough data to show this chart yet.

gender.title: Gender distribution
gender.description: The recorded gender composition of family members.

age.title: Age distribution
age.description: Age groups at the time this report was generated.

timeline.title: Members over time
timeline.description: New records and cumulative tree size for each month.
timeline.empty: No member creation timeline is available yet.
timeline.aria: Member growth line chart over time

geography.title: Geographic distribution
geography.description: Members' current address or recorded birthplace.

occupation.title: Occupations
occupation.description: The most common fields of work across the family.

errors.title: The report could not be completed
errors.load: Statistics could not be loaded. Please try again.
errors.export: The PDF could not be generated right now.

settingsPage.description: Manage your workspace preferences and privacy.
settingsPage.workspaceDescription: Language, appearance, and navigation preferences are available from the shell.
settingsPage.workspaceHint: Use the theme and language controls in the top bar to personalize your experience.
settingsPage.privacyDescription: Your family data stays private and access is managed by your account.
settingsPage.privacyHint: More controls will be available as your family trees are added.

errors.offline: You are offline. Changes will sync when you reconnect.

login.visualText: Preserve memories, connect relatives, and pass your family history on to generations to come.
login.title: Welcome back
login.subtitle: Sign in to continue your family journey.
login.verified: Your email is verified. You can now sign in.
login.invalidToken: The verification link is invalid or has expired.

errors.invalid: The email or password is incorrect.
errors.locked: Your account is locked for 15 minutes after 5 failed sign-in attempts.
errors.unverified: Please verify your email before signing in.
errors.generic: Unable to sign in right now. Please try again.

register.visualTitle: Preserve what makes your family unique.
register.visualText: Create a private place for the people, stories, and milestones that matter.
register.title: Create your account
register.subtitle: Start building your family's secure genealogy.
register.name: Full name
register.passwordHint: At least 12 characters with uppercase, lowercase, number, and special character.
register.successVerification: Your account is ready. Check your email and verify it before signing in.
register.successReady: Your account is ready. You can sign in now.

errors.invalid: Please check your details and password strength.
errors.generic: Unable to create your account right now. Please try again.
